content:
# Latin Hypercube Sampling

**Summary**: A stratified sampling technique that ensures a more representative sample of the input distribution in fewer iterations than standard Monte Carlo.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2003-al-shridi|Al-Shridi, 2003]] applied Latin Hypercube sampling to improve simulation efficiency and accuracy when modeling volume distributions.

## Instruments and Software



## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- Latin Hypercube sampling requires fewer iterations to reach the same level of accuracy as Monte Carlo because it samples from stratified intervals. ([[2003-al-shridi|Al-Shridi, 2003, p. 34]])
